pattern: Hero + Social Proof + Features + Pricing + CTA
key_effects: subtle hover 200ms,scroll-stagger on features,single accent CTA
anti_patterns: carousel heroes,autoplaying video with audio,more than one primary CTA,fake urgency timers

pattern: Hero + Code Sample + Features + Docs CTA
anti_patterns: marketing fluff above the code,stock photography of people,hiding the install command
decorative animation,color-only encoding,3D charts,pie charts with many slices
heavy motion,oversized hero,marketing copy,low-density layouts that force scrolling

key_effects: hover product preview,sticky add-to-cart,fast image loading
anti_patterns: hidden shipping cost,forced account creation,carousel-only product images,tiny tap targets

key_effects: staggered work reveal,cursor affordance,image hover scale
anti_patterns: autoplay audio,slow intro animation blocking content,unlabeled work thumbnails
generic stock imagery,tiny body text under a huge hero,motion with no reduced-motion path
justified text,measure over 80ch,interstitial popups,motion during reading
playful illustration for money movement,hidden fees,ambiguous confirmation states,color-only gain/loss
dark patterns in booking,alarming reds,low-contrast pastels,jargon without plain language
wall-of-text curriculum,hidden pricing,inaccessible video without captions
aggressive before/after imagery,shaming copy,pastel text failing contrast
guilt-driven dark patterns,unclear fund allocation,donate flow with many steps
decorative motion,jargon,PDF-only information,color-only status
implying capabilities the model lacks,hiding cost or limits,fake streaming,no failure state
desktop-first layout,44px-minimum violations,hover-dependent interactions

key_effects: signature WebGL or video hero,parallax,bold transitions
anti_patterns: unmuted autoplay,motion with no reduced-motion path,neon text failing contrast,heavy hero blocking first paint
countdown that keeps resetting,unclear timezone,register flow behind a login
menu as an image or PDF only,missing hours/location,slow uncompressed photos
marketing polish over usability,animation that slows operators,hiding destructive actions
